'''Kuma Nai''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] who was involved in the production of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], yet was also secretly a member of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Biography==
[[File:SepKam2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The death of the Kaminoan spy.]]
Nai created the [[Kaminoan nano-virus]] and planned to spread it to all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. The plan failed when [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] and [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] arrived to investigate the sickness infecting the clones. As the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] tried to escape, she became involved in a struggle with Secura. During the melee, she was infected with the nano-virus as she attempted to poison the Jedi and was killed instantly.<ref name="Tales 14 />

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|14|Tides of Terror}} {{1st}}
